evidence: Public MessageLite::MergeFromString() on a lite-runtime message with nums size forced to INT_MAX triggers AddressSanitizer bad-__sanitizer_annotate_contiguous_container in google::protobuf::internal::EpsCopyInputStream::ReadPackedFixed<unsigned int>() from the real arm64 ASan libprotobuf build. See bugs/protobuf/protobuf-input-003/validation/asan_output.txt.
